channel.title: MCP Radar — new MCP servers
channel.description: New and trending Model Context Protocol servers, auto-discovered from GitHub daily.

item.title: vshulcz/deja-vu
item.description: Memory layer for coding agents: search, MCP recall, auto-context, secret redaction, stats, share and sync over the session logs Claude Code, Codex and opencode already write. One zero-dep binary. — ⭐312, Go

item.title: alexpilotto/uxon-ai
item.description: UXON is an MCP server and API that lets AI agents and developers create landing pages, run A/B experiments, and track conversions across domains. — ⭐23, n/a

item.title: siemd2/reel-relay
item.description: Share an Instagram reel to Claude and have it watch, research, and build what it shows. Self-hosted MCP connector (yt-dlp + ffmpeg + Groq Whisper). — ⭐10, Python

item.title: mr-sanjai-offl/google-forms-mcp
item.description: Production-grade MCP server for Google Forms, Google Drive & Google Sheets. Build, automate, and manage forms using AI-powered workflows and complete Google Workspace integration. — ⭐7, Python

item.title: NousC/opennous
item.description: The context graph for agentic GTM teams. Unify the data scattered across your GTM tools into one identity-resolved account any agent reads in a single call. — ⭐7, TypeScript

item.title: IlyasKhallouki/hypruse
item.description: Computer use for Hyprland - MCP server giving AI agents native hands on your Wayland desktop. No ydotool, no root, no portals. — ⭐4, Python

item.title: Facetomyself/ruyi-mcp
item.description: Community MCP server for ruyiPage browser automation, network inspection, fingerprint analysis, and WebDriver BiDi trace workflows. — ⭐4, TypeScript

item.title: nirholas/robinhood-chain-mcp
item.description: Model Context Protocol servers for Robinhood Chain — zero-config read-only data server plus an opt-in trading server with hard spend caps and confirm gates. — ⭐4, TypeScript

item.title: NmaaAlhawary/MCP-Moodle
item.description: Control Moodle from an AI assistant via MCP — read courses and build content (pages, books, quizzes) through a companion plugin + MCP server. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: Pseudogiant-xr/Pseudolife-MCP
item.description: Persistent long-term memory for Claude — an MCP server with an associative memory bank, a canonical-fact cortex, sleep-like dream consolidation, and a web console. Not quite alive. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: charbelkassab/relatio-crm
item.description: Lightweight self-hosted CRM with a built-in MCP connector. Let Claude, ChatGPT, or Gemini run your pipeline. — ⭐3, JavaScript

item.title: richarvey/OmniMem
item.description: Self-hosted semantic memory for AI Agents. Persistent sessions, experience scoring, and a graveyard for dead ends, backed by knowledge acquired from the RSS you read and stored in a Valkey vector sear — ⭐3, Python

item.title: BEKO2210/Knowledge-Hub
item.description: Self-hosted MCP server: your codebase as a knowledge graph, your secrets in an encrypted vault — both reachable by your AI assistant, and by nobody else. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: Fons-vc/fons
item.description: The Fons agent surface — read and update your founder profile, company, product, metrics and data room from your AI assistant. Skill · MCP · CLI. — ⭐3, JavaScript

item.title: JesusRS1/stock-trade-finance-api
item.description: Stock Trade MCP server in Tiingo with stock prices, news, forex, and fundamentals programmatically via the MCP — ⭐91, TypeScript

item.title: tonnode/mcp
item.description: TON MCP server for Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Codex and any MCP client — liteserver queries over native ADNL: balances, account state, transaction history, get-methods. Private & archive endpoints suppo — ⭐66, TypeScript

item.title: 0xmiki/figmaboy
item.description: A local-first desktop interface design tool with a native MCP server for Codex. — ⭐9, Svelte

item.title: vynazevedo/ARKHE
item.description: Portal de arquitetura auto-hospedado + linguagem executável: catálogo verificado, landscape C4 com drill-in, governança (fitness functions e SLO por caminho crítico) e editor no browser. Binário Go ún — ⭐5, Go

item.title: MiiKiyoshi/tex-mcp-web
item.description: Agentic-first PDF review for LaTeX papers: live web viewer + comment queue + MCP server for Claude Code — ⭐4, Python

item.title: suren-kk/armenian-national-library-mcp
item.description: Unofficial MCP server for discovering and querying Armenian National Library archives and data — ⭐4, TypeScript

item.title: davidnichols-ops/trustcard
item.description: The "npm audit" for MCP servers — a public trust card for every Model Context Protocol server. — ⭐3, JavaScript

item.title: syouro/InkPaw
item.description: An MCP server and deterministic DOCX toolkit for AI agents—create, edit, validate, and render reliable Word documents with a local agent playground. — ⭐3, JavaScript

item.title: alphaparkinc/genpark-loomal-mcp-billing-gateway-skill
item.description: Loomal-like billing gateway for MCP servers usage — ⭐3, Python

item.title: Alex663028/pulse-agent
item.description: Pulse — Hermes-style self-improving AI agent. Reliability-first rebuild with evaluated skill self-evolution, multi-agent team orchestration, dialectic user modeling, and fully self-hosted default stac — ⭐3, Python

item.title: valtors/observer
item.description: Transparent MCP proxy for agent observability. Logs every tool call, exposes trace history, reduces token overhead. — ⭐3, Go

item.title: FROWNINGdev/django-orm-lens
item.description: Live sidebar, ER diagrams, CLI, and MCP server for Django models. VS Code + PyPI + MCP Registry + Glama. Zero-dep parser, no DB required. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: yagyeshVyas/VibeGuard
item.description: Free security & privacy scanner for AI-coded apps. 699 rules, 76 MCP tools, 13-layer defense, zero-trust sandbox, AI firewall. Runs locally, never sends data anywhere. Scan your AI-generated app for l — ⭐3, JavaScript

item.title: ArtemBaranov/rkmatrix-mcp-server
item.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server built with FastMCP to provide AI models with structured technical data about rootkit techniques and families. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: flaviomartil/token-skein
item.description: Token-efficiency proxy for Codex/OpenAI Responses API: recoverable storage, MCP server, opt-in visual compaction, effort routing — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: sanghun0724/configdeck
item.description: Native macOS SwiftUI dashboard for inspecting your ~/.claude config — skills, agents, settings, hooks, MCP servers, slash commands. — ⭐3, Swift
